## M1 drift-flag ratio (CHARTER §3)

For each gate, `(fit_score < 0.5 invocations) / total > 0.20` triggers auto-deprecation review.  
All current entries carry `fit_score: 1.0` — no gate is near the deprecation threshold.

## Monitoring guidance (cutover precondition)

- **Normal range:** allow rate ≈ 60%, refuse rate ≈ 27%, warn rate ≈ 5%
- **Alert:** if refuse rate exceeds 50% in any 24h window → investigate gate blockage
- **Alert:** if any gate drops to 0 emissions in a 24h window during live operation → gate may be bypassed
- **Alert:** if new cap_id values appear that are not in `capabilities.yaml` and not in `_PHASE4D_DEFERRED_CAP_IDS` → test_help_not_gate will catch this automatically
